service.name: Workday API
service.description_for_ai: Enterprise HR platform. Employee records, payroll, recruiting, time tracking, benefits, learning. Used by 10K+ organizations. Use for HR automation, employee data integration, talent management.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Enterprise HR platform. Employee records, payroll, recruiting, time tracking, benefits, learning. Used by 10K+ organizations. Use for HR automation, employee data integration, talent management. Get employee records from Workday HCM. Returns employee profiles with job info, department, location.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

offset.description: Number of records to skip for pagination
